item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya bersikeras bahwa prioritas individu lebih penting daripada kepentingan masyarakat.

notes: Agent A opens by supporting society-first priority, then reverses at turn 3 and continues at turn 5 to prioritize individual rights. Agent B starts from balance and rights protection, shifts at turn 4 toward the original society-priority statement, then ends balanced. Turn 4 includes the non-Latin string "印尼" inside an English response; scores are based on the observable argumentative text.
